Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK Motion to Set Aside and Vacate Default and Default Judgment entered on August 5, 2009. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
